category_sources: Official ATGC FastME homepage describes the project as phylogeny inference software.
source_facts.description says FastME is for distance-based phylogeny inference.
display_name_sources: Official ATGC FastME homepage uses the FastME project name.
source_facts.source-archive path names the upstream project FastME.
docs_sources: Official ATGC FastME homepage is the primary official documentation/download surface found for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is served from the official LIRMM GitLab project path gite.lirmm.fr/atgc/FastME.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the fastme command-line executable.
